subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Jud
subcodes.first_line: O thou who bearest My Name, Júd! Upon thee be My Glory. Give ear unto that which thou didst hear aforetime
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسمی الجود علیک بهائی ان استمع ما سمعته من قبل اذ کان نیر البرهان مشرقا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @wisdom [hikmat]
